params_used.custom_text: // Selects a 5-bit output code from a 40-bit wide input based on a 3-bit wide selection signal. The module uses a case statement to map the values of the input `num` (ranging from 8 to -1) to specific 5-bit slices of the `dig` input. When `num` corresponds to a specific value, it outputs the corresponding segment of `dig`; if `num` is outside the valid range, it defaults to outputting zero.
